principles: Do not overwrite reviewed records with machine candidates.
Keep machine candidates and low-confidence records visible in review queues.
Archive root-level superseded files only after canonical copies exist.

steps.details: Create exam_bank_taxonomy/canonical, review_queue, archive, and logs folders.
Copy best root-level taxonomy artifacts into canonical subfolders using existing v1 names.
Export low-confidence, whole-question-only, prerequisite-only, context-only, invalid-reference, missing-evidence, and questionable reviewed records.
Move root-level source artifacts into archive/superseded or archive/deprecated after canonical copies are verified.
Validate JSON, naming, IDs, references, strict-filter rules, and index coverage.
